bins.description: AXI write burst accepted as one TLP.
MCTP key and transport fields decoded.
Context allocation and append behavior exercised.
Every PD_* packet drop reason is observed.
Every AD_* assembly drop reason is observed.
AXI write and read ready/valid hold rules exercised.
SRAM write priority over firmware read exercised.
Input and output backpressure cases exercised.

coverage_goals.scenario: All SSOT scenarios pass with executable cocotb/pyuvm checkers and FL-vs-RTL scoreboard evidence

plan.transaction_name: Accept one AXI4 write burst as one PCIe VDM TLP
Validate PCIe VDM envelope for MCTP transport
Decode MCTP transport header and context key
Allocate or update a Q context for one MCTP fragment
Pack payload bytes into 32-byte SRAM beats with no holes
Complete EOM message and publish descriptor
Packet drop without SRAM payload write
Assembly drop without descriptor publish
APB register access
AXI readback from descriptor-backed SRAM payload
